data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit a57ac980bc55 and impl commit fcba1f7d06f7 are on main. (2) Only expected files changed: agent-history-view.tsx and interaction-picker.tsx (84 insertions, 84 deletions — pure class replacements). (3) Changes match plan: font sizes bumped +1px, text colors shifted lighter (slate-200→100, sky-100→50, etc.), background opacities increased, border colors lightened. (4) No invariants defined. (5) Typecheck clean in src/ (work/ worktree errors are pre-existing). (6) No behavioral changes — purely visual styling.
